title: Roll-up Subitems to en EXISTING collumn>

posts.author: Scott-Pigeon (Scott Sosebee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to rill-up a subitem summary to an EXISTING parent column?
I do not want to create a new column for this info.

eg; I have a column labeled “Current Spend” in my Job Tracking Board. Occasionally my jobs have Subitems (which, I didn’t discover until after I had built the board). I’d like the “Current Spend” subitem columns to sum-up to the existing “Current Spend” column in the parent item.
I’ve noticed a 3rd party app from Excellent Team called Rollup Subitems, from a discussing back in 2022. But I still don’t see the app on the Monday.com Marketplace.
Any help would be greatly appreciated.
Thanks!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m not familiar with a way to do this natively. Maybe check out ‘subitem automations’ app?

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Scott-Pigeon,

You might find the automation from our Subitems Pro Automations app useful for your case:

image435×375 11.5 KB

This will work assuming “Current Spend” column is a number column. If not, let us know and we’ll make sure to handle it.

posts.author: Scott-Pigeon (Scott Sosebee)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so much! This is great. This newbie appreciates your help. =]
